Mesa Pedestrian Risk Map (2020–2024)
This map highlights areas where pedestrian-involved crashes are disproportionately concentrated relative to Mesa's citywide baseline.
  • RRI = (cell pedestrian crash rate) / (Mesa pedestrian crash rate)
  • Red = higher-than-average involvement; Green = lower-than-average
Note: This is based on historical crash reports and does not adjust for pedestrian volume/exposure.
Relative Risk Index (RRI)
Low (<0.75× avg)
Typical (0.75–1.25×)
Elevated (1.25–2×)
High (>2× avg)
Mesa Pedestrian Risk Map
2020–2024 • Relative Risk Index (RRI)

Identifies areas where pedestrian crashes are disproportionately concentrated relative to Mesa’s baseline.

  • RRI = local crash rate ÷ citywide average
  • Red = higher-than-average risk
  • Green = lower-than-average risk
Based on historical crash data (no exposure adjustment).
Legend
Low
Typical
Elevated
High
